response.justification: Candidate has strong technical foundations, 15+ years of breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, and is currently working on AI-agent frameworks at staff level. However, they lack the formal AI/ML education (preferred Master's/PhD), demonstrated AI products or platforms, and strategic customer advisory experience the principal engineer role requires. Recent AI-agent work is promising but underdeveloped in the resume, with no evidence of recognized expertise or thought leadership in AI strategy.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack technical experience with exceptional breadth across web, mobile, infrastructure, and DevOps
Current staff-level role actively building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, showing emerging engagement with AI strategy space
Strong mentorship and leadership track record through workshops, code dojos, and multiple staff-level positions
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI/ML field (has two Bachelor's degrees, one in unrelated Photography/Video/Image Processing)
Limited evidence of recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI-powered products—recent MCP/agentic work lacks sufficient detail or public recognition
Resume focused on technical implementation rather than strategic vision, customer advisory, or product strategy typically expected for director-level principal engineer role

key_factors.factor: Missing formal AI/ML education and recognized expertise
Recent AI-agent infrastructure work shows promising trajectory but lacks depth
Strong technical breadth and staff-level experience
